name: Nardone v. United States
summary: Evidence obtained through illegal wiretapping inadmissible; derivative evidence (fruit of poisonous tree) also inadmissible unless independent source established.
holding: Federal Communications Act prohibition on wiretapping enforceable through exclusion of illegally obtained evidence; government must demonstrate independent source for derivative evidence or exclusion applies.
relevance_to_audit: Early establishment of fruit of poisonous tree doctrine; relevant to chain of custody analysis and derivative evidence from tainted sources.
procedural_posture: Conviction reversed, remanded for determination of independent source
